name: ZLint
description: ZLint schema from Asset Graph API

errors_present.description: Whether the certificate's attributes triggered any error lints for non-conformance to the X.509 standard.

failed_lints.description: A list of lint names which failed, if applicable.

fatals_present.description: Whether the certificate's attributes triggered any fatal lints for non-conformance to the X.509 standard.

notices_present.description: Whether the certificate's attributes triggered any notice lints for non-conformance to the X.509 standard.

timestamp.description: An RFC-3339-formated timestamp indicating when the certificate was linted.

version.description: The version of Zlint used to lint the certificate.

warnings_present.description: Whether the certificate's attributes triggered any warning lints for non-conformance to the X.509 standard.
